title: Adhaaru Adhaaru Lyrics Yennai Arindhaal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Yennai Arindhaal Adhaaru Adhaaru Lyrics .
Singer(s): Vijay Prakash & Gaana Bala

Source- Youtube

Vaa raaja vaa vaa
Ada idhaan un daavaa
Yenga ellaarukkum no va
Nenju valikudhu slow-ah.

Aanadhu aachu
namma kaiyya meeri pochu
Adi yaen vetti pechu
romba sokkaakkeedhu match-u

Lungiyathaan thookki kattu
Dustu padudhu.
Selayaththaan yaethi kattu
Hip-pu theridhu. (2)

Mangi pona moonji ellaam
Daaladikkudhu.
Songi pona namma janam
Kooththadikkudhu.

Adhaaru adhaaru adhaaru adhaaru
Udhaaru udhaaru kaattaadhe udhaaru (2)

Ellaamey inimel nallaathaan nadakkum,
Pattaasum summaave koluththaama
vedikkum.

Adhaaru adhaaru adhaaru adhaaru
Udhaaru udhaaru kaattaadhe udhaaru
Ellaamey inimel nallaathaan nadakkum,
Pattaasum summaave koluththaama
vedikkum.

Vaasa malli vaasam versa
Vaasal variyaa.
Un aasai ellaam yaeththukkathaan
Naanum illaya. (2)

De collarathaan thookkaamale
Aada variya.
Bigul adichchi ragala seiyya
Neeyum ready ya. (2)

Adhaaru adhaaru adhaaru adhaaru
Udhaaru udhaaru kaattaadhe udhaaru.(2)

Vaazhai kattum Vella
master of kola kolla.
Lighta kattum vichu
nalla poduvaanda sketchu.
galeeju raaidu
parisuththamaana fraud-u..
ho haiyo ..oh ho haiyo

pandhala kattum mayilu
ivan porandha idam jailu.
pandhiya paakkura baala
vaaikku arisi poduvaan dhoolaa.
panneera thellikkum john-u
avan sumaara poduvaan scene-u.
ho haiyo ..oh ho haiyo..

ada ellaam onnaa seru
podu orae thattula soru.
enga ellaroda natpu
kadal kaathtthula kaladnha uppu..

Adhaaru adhaaru adhaaru adhaaru
Udhaaru udhaaru kaattaadhe udhaaru.(2)

Lungiyathaan thookki kattu
Dustu padudhu.
Selayaththaan suththi kattu
Hip-pu theridhu.

Mangi pona moonji ellaam
Daaladikkudhu. (Machi)
Songi pona namma janam
Kooththadikkudhu. (2)

Vaa raaja vaa vaa
Ada idhaan un daavaa
Yenga ellaarukkum no va
Nenju valikudhu slow-ah.

Aanadhu aachu
namma kaiyya meeri pochu
Adi yaen vetti pechu
romba sokkaakkeedhu match-u

Lungiyathaan thookki kattu
Dustu padudhu.
Selayaththaan yaethi kattu
Hip-pu theridhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Adhaaru Adhaaru?

The music was composed by the talented Harrish Jeyaraj.

Which movie features the song Adhaaru Adhaaru?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Yennai Arindhaal.

Who are the singers of the song Adhaaru Adhaaru?

The song is sung by Gaana Bala and Vijay Prakash.

What is the mood of the song Adhaaru Adhaaru?

The song has an energetic and peppy mood, making it perfect for celebrations.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Yennai Arindhaal?

The lead roles are played by Ajith Kumar and Trisha Krishnan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Adhaaru Adhaaru from the movie Yennai Arindhaal, released in 2015, is a high-energy dance number featuring the charismatic Ajith Kumar and the talented Trisha Krishnan. Composed by Harrish Jeyaraj and performed by Gaana Bala and Vijay Prakash, the song combines folk elements with modern beats. It captures a celebratory and vibrant mood, making it a favorite for festive occasions and parties. The lyrics and rhythm create an electrifying atmosphere, reflecting the dynamic essence of the movie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Adhaaru Adhaaru from the movie Yennai Arindhaal is a vibrant and energetic track that captivates listeners with its rhythmic beats and dynamic vocals. Composed by Harrish Jeyaraj and sung by Gaana Bala and Vijay Prakash, this song showcases a perfect blend of folk and modern elements. Experience the electrifying vibe of this dance number that adds a unique charm to the movie's soundtrack.
stanzaMeanings: Understand me, cheer up, cheer up.
Come, king, come, come. This is your claim. For all of us, there's no 'no'. The heart aches slowly.
It happened, it’s done, it’s beyond our hands. Why does idle talk make the match so dull?
Lift the lungi and tie it up, it’s getting mischievous. Wrap the saree around, the hip is visible.
All the faded faces are getting excited. Our people who were down are now dancing.
Cheer up, cheer up, cheer up, cheer up. Don’t show off, don’t show off, don’t show off.
From now on, everything will go well. Fireworks will burst without lighting them.
Cheer up, cheer up, cheer up, cheer up. Don’t show off, don’t show off, don’t show off. From now on, everything will go well. Fireworks will burst without lighting them.
The fragrance of jasmine is different. Will you come to the doorstep? I’m not here to fulfill all your desires.
Will you dance without lifting your collar? Are you ready to make noise and create a ruckus?
Cheer up, cheer up, cheer up, cheer up. Don’t show off, don’t show off, don’t show off.
The banana leaf is tied, the white master of chaos. Lightly tied, a good plan is made. A college ride, a pure fraud.
The peacock that decorates the tent, his birthplace is jail. The rice is poured into the mouth of the child watching the race. John, who sprinkles rose water, casually creates a scene.
Put everything together, serve it on one plate. Our friendship is like salt dissolved in the sea.

Lift the lungi and tie it up, it’s getting mischievous. Wrap the saree around, the hip is visible.
